working_on.task: Secured API Keys and fixed layout
working_on.notes: System is now hardened against API key leaks and production-ready on Vercel.

pending_tasks.task: Verify production deployment after Vercel redeploy
Enhance UI for Phi Tinh visualization

recent_changes.description: Implemented Serverless Proxy architecture to prevent Gemini API Key leaks.
Fixed phone input helper text causing layout distortion; added premium info banner.

errors_encountered.error: Vercel 500 on /api/gemini due to catch-all rewrite
errors_encountered.solution: Updated vercel.json to exclude /api/(.*) from index.html rewrite
Moved keys to Vercel Environment Variables and implemented backend proxy

decisions_made.reason: Vite/Frontend .env still bundles keys into JS; Proxy keeps them 100% on server.
